title: OrchestrationCoreState
description: Persistent orchestration state tracking all agent invocation lifecycles for opencode-nexus.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last state write.

invocations.description: Ordered list of all agent invocation records.

InvocationLifecycleStatus.description: Lifecycle status of an agent invocation.

child_session_id.description: Session ID of the spawned child agent.

child_task_id.description: Task ID of the spawned child agent.

resume_session_id.description: Session ID to resume from on next invocation.

resume_task_id.description: Task ID to resume from on next invocation.

resume_handles.description: Arbitrary key-value handles for adapter-specific resume hints.

coordination_label.description: Group coordination label for multi-agent coordination.

purpose.description: Human-readable description of what this invocation was for.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the invocation started.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last invocation update.

ended_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the invocation ended (absent if still running).

last_message.description: Last known message or status note from the agent.
